free_text: 9Be+120Sn scattering at near-barrier energies within a
European Centre for Technical Studies in
Nuclear Physics and Related Areas (ECT*), Villazzano
For three energies (29.5, 42 and 50 MeV), a stack of
two targets (compatible with 160 ug/cm2 of 120Sn) was
used to double the otherwise too low counting rates
Normalized to Rutherford ratio at 25 deg, which
was cross checked by Faraday cup
The bombarding energies are expressed in the
laboratory system and calculated in the middle of the
- differences between Faraday cup normalization and
that obtained with the monitor, and
On. Received by an email from A.Arazi.
